# SAGEDO
> India's First AI + Human Hybrid Execution Team

SAGEDO builds and grows Indian businesses using AI automation combined with human execution. We deliver websites, SEO, CRM systems, WhatsApp bots, legal registrations, and more — in 24-48 hours.

- Website: https://sagedo.in
- Services: https://sagedo.in/services
- Orders: https://sagedo.in/orders
- About: https://sagedo.in/about
- Blog: https://sagedo.in/blog
- Contact: contactus@sagedo.in
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/916284925684
- Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India
- Founded: 2025
- Founder: Mukul Dhiman (Ex-Aerospace Engineer, Tata Lockheed Martin)

## Services
Full structured data about all 20 services, packages and pricing: https://sagedo.in/services.json

## Packages
- Starter Launch: ₹15,000 one-time — Logo, Website, SEO, Google Business, Email
- Full Launch: ₹35,000 one-time — Complete digital business in 30 days
- VIP Launch: ₹95,000 one-time — Enterprise infrastructure, app, dedicated engineer
